title: Visited Dr. Aritra Ghosh (Laparoscopic Surgeon)
text: He was proactive from the beginning — getting the reports done quickly, identifying the malignancy early, and taking timely decisions whenever needed. During such a difficult phase for our family, what truly meant the most was that he was always available. Whether through phone calls or messages, he patiently guided us, answered every concern, and supported us throughout the journey. Even though my own sister is a plastic surgeon based in Mumbai, we still found ourselves relying on Dr. Ghosh’s guidance and reassurance because of the trust and confidence he gave us.
